mapper.sql:
WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND (a.effective_time IS NULL OR a.effective_time <= NOW()) AND (a.expire_time IS NULL OR a.expire_time >= NOW())
AND a.controller_id = d.id
AND a.device_id = d.id
AND a.tenant_id = #{currentTenantId}
AND (a.effective_time IS NULL OR a.effective_time >= #{authEffectiveTime})
AND (a.expire_time IS NOT NULL AND a.expire_time <= #{authExpireTime})
